perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a black ruffled top and grey skirt is seen in a brightly lit shopping mall, pointing at a cake display case. A white dog in a yellow stroller is beside her. (2) Close-up shots of various cakes in the display case, specifically focusing on a dark glazed roll and a layered round cake. (3) The woman walks through the mall towards the camera, excitedly holding two shopping bags from the brand '米滋崎'. (4) The scene shifts to an indoor living room setting where the woman is joined by another woman wearing a zebra-patterned bucket hat. They sit at a table with the cakes open, slicing them and showing the internal texture to the camera while eating and gesturing with thumbs up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic BGM plays. A female voice speaks in an excited and energetic tone in Mandarin, narrating the shopping experience. Ambient mall noise is low. (2) Short, sharp sound effects (SFX) occur when text overlays pop up on screen. (3) During the tasting segment, two distinct female voices are heard. One is more energetic and descriptive, while the other provides agreement and supplementary comments. The sound of a knife cutting through cake and forks clinking on ceramic plates is clearly audible.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text: '台中火紅伴手禮' (Taichung's popular souvenir) in large, colorful, outlined font. (2) Hook text: '香芋起司 獨家限定' (Taro Cheese Exclusive Limited) with stars and a pink heart. (3) Functional text: '楓糖布丁卷' (Maple Pudding Roll) and '起司香芋蛋糕' (Cheese Taro Cake) identifying the products. (4) Functional text: Prices shown as '390元' and '460元'. (5) Decorative text: '好誠意哦' (Very sincere/generous) and 'CP值很高' (High cost-performance ratio) to emphasize the value. (6) Subtitles provided for all spoken dialogue.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Shopping at mall -> Product reveal -> Detailed home-based tasting and review.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator in black, 1 co-host in a zebra hat during the second half.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The first woman has long dark hair, wearing a black ruffled shirt and a grey skirt. The second woman has shorter hair and wears a zebra-patterned bucket hat and a white sweater with overalls.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first part is a modern, high-end shopping mall with glass displays and bright overhead lights. The second part is a cozy living room with a brown leather sofa, white rug, and soft warm lighting.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright commercial lighting followed by warm home interior lighting.
visual_scene_and_style.colorTone: Natural and warm, with high saturation on the food items.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a lifestyle and food vlog intended to review and promote specific dessert products from the brand '米滋崎' in Taichung. It uses an enthusiastic tone and detailed visual cross-sections of the cakes to highlight their quality and value proposition to the audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed display of brand packaging, price discussion, and highly positive review of specific products.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy Mandarin narration with rhythmic text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The inclusion of a pet in a stroller at the beginning adds a relatable lifestyle element to the food review.
